vitals.aid_stations: multiple with local wines and food

course_description.overview: Vintage cycling event in Rioja DOC wine region with routes through vineyards, castles, fortresses, and overlapping Camino de Santiago pilgrimage path.

key_segments.name: Cenicero Start
key_segments.description: Rolling vineyards and opening exhibition area.

key_segments.name: Medieval Hilltop Towns
key_segments.description: Passes castles, watchtowers, and historic sites with cultural significance.

key_segments.name: Camino de Santiago Section
key_segments.description: Pilgrimage route with scenic and spiritual elements.

key_segments.name: Final Rioja Vines
key_segments.description: Return through wine country with epic scenery.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging vintage bike ride on hilly paved roads emphasizing epic fatigue and conquest in stunning wine landscapes.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Logroño Airport or Bilbao; trains/buses to Logroño then transfer to Haro/Cenicero.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels in Logroño like Hotel Murrieta; options in Haro and Cenicero during event weekend.
logistics.registration_details: Entry includes event participation, vintage fair, gastronomic experiences; packages from €390 with tours.
logistics.bike_logistics: Vintage bikes required (pre-1987); rentals via local tours like Bike Spain; check routes on arrival.
logistics.local_considerations: Wine region: enjoy Rioja tastings; hot June weather; events include classic car displays, music, beard contest.

final_verdict.one_liner: Epic vintage road ride through Rioja's vineyards and castles, blending cycling heritage with wine culture.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Vintage bike enthusiasts, wine lovers, and seekers of authentic Eroica atmosphere.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the unique cultural fusion and magical event vibe.
pro_tips: Bring a pre-1987 vintage bike in top condition.
Book accommodation early in Logroño or Haro.
Sample Rioja wines at aid stations and fairs.
Join the beard contest for extra fun.

videos.title: Eroica Dolomiti 2019
videos.description: San Candido, in Val Pusteria, and the enchanting mountainous landscapes of the Dolomites, where cycling has been both history and legend, in the natural context of bike, fatigue, adventure and heroism.

videos.title: Eroica 2019 - Hexlox Does the Eroica Retro-Gravel Gran Fondo
videos.description:
Eroica Gaiole in Chianti - 2019

What better way to chase away the winter blues than to watch this delightful video about Hexlox’s very own CEO, Marcus, retro-adventures In Tuscany recently.

Juggling their smartphones, a glass of wine (or two) and lots of ice cream, Marcus and 2 industry partners took part in the epic Eroica, a +200 km ride through the Tuscan Hills.  

This legendary ride, the full name being Eroica Gaiole in Chianti, covers 209 km through the heart of the Terre di Siena, crossing the Chianti, the Crete Senesi, and the Val d’Orcia, completing a journey into the artistic essence of the legendary Tuscan countryside. 

Setting off in the pitch-black morning with his crew, Marcus covered over 3000m altitude difference and finished super hungry but with a big smile. The average ride is about 15 hrs and many riders finish well after 10 pm!  

The riders must ride on period-correct, vintage steel bikes which of course makes it both harder and more fun. A big part of the allure of this unforgettable adventure lies in the Strade Bianchi - the dusty unpaved white roads - that the riders have to traverse using no modern equipment like carbon frames or disk brakes.

L'Eroica was born in 1997 in Gaiole in Chianti, a small village in the province of Siena, where creator Giancarlo Brocci, together with 92 hunters of “feelings and emotions” - as he called them - started the first edition of a magical cycling event; an event combining challenging routes, magnificent landscapes and unforgettable refreshments in a unique way.

videos.title: EROICA: IL PERCORSO LUNGO.
videos.description: L'Eroica di Gaiole, la ciclostorica per eccellenza. Qui, nella XX edizione del 2016, mi ritovai a pedalare la strada più lunga. Ecco la mia soggettiva, un POV, come si dice oggi.

videos.title: La Eroica
videos.description:
Cocktail created by Carina Soto Velasquez  with Havana Club Professional Edition C.
" Asbel Morales is a man of traditions, his incredible knowledge and his vision was a big inspiration to me. Is a short drink that highlights the gold color of Edition C, is elegant and classic like the provenance of the rum "
